data.name: Marcus Rivera Photography
data.description:
Marcus Rivera is a New York based photographer specializing in weddings, portraits, and commercial storytelling.

His style blends editorial composition with documentary spontaneity to produce work that feels both cinematic and deeply human.

data.testimonial_1_quote: He captured our wedding day with incredible emotion.
data.testimonial_2_quote: Marcus delivered campaign shots that drove engagement immediately.
data.testimonial_3_quote: Fast turnaround and flawless quality across 3 shoot days.
data.testimonial_4_quote: Our portraits felt effortless and editorial at once.
data.testimonial_5_quote: A true professional from planning to final delivery.
